memberdef.name: resolution_table
memberdef.initializer: = { XVIDC_VM_640x480_60_P, XVIDC_VM_480_60_P, XVIDC_VM_800x600_60_P, XVIDC_VM_1024x768_60_P, XVIDC_VM_720_60_P, XVIDC_VM_1600x1200_60_P, XVIDC_VM_1366x768_60_P, XVIDC_VM_1080_60_P, XVIDC_VM_UHD_30_P, XVIDC_VM_UHD_60_P, XVIDC_VM_2560x1600_60_P, XVIDC_VM_1280x1024_60_P, XVIDC_VM_1792x1344_60_P, XVIDC_VM_848x480_60_P, XVIDC_VM_1280x960_60_P, XVIDC_VM_1920x1440_60_P, XVIDC_VM_USE_EDID_PREFERRED }

briefdescription.para: This function is called when DisplayPort TX Subsystem core requires delay or sleep.

detaileddescription.para: It provides timer with predefined amount of loop iterations.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDp instance.

simplesect.para: Use the XDpTxSs_SetUserTimerHandler driver function to set this function as the handler custom delay/sleep.

briefdescription.para: This function is called when a Hot-Plug-Detect (HPD) event is received by the DisplayPort TX Subsystem core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpTxSs instance.

simplesect.para: Use the XDpTxSs_SetCallback driver function to set this function as the handler for HPD event.

briefdescription.para: This function is called when a Hot-Plug-Detect (HPD) pulse is received by the DisplayPort TX Subsystem core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpTxSs instance.

simplesect.para: Use the XDpTxSs_SetCallback driver function to set this function as the handler for HPD pulse.

memberdef.argsstring: (u8 line_rate, u8 lane_count, XVidC_VideoMode res_table, u8 bpc, u8 pat)
memberdef.name: start_tx
